chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-1105 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For order on M.A No.1499/2025 (return of surety) 20.10.2025 Mr.Waheed Ahmed Awan, Advocate for applicant/surety ********* The listed application has been moved by the applicant/surety seeking return of the surety documents. However, learned counsel for the applicant/surety candidly concedes that the accused, for whom the surety was furnished, failed to surrender before the trial Court within the time specified in the Order dated 10.11.2020. In the circumstances, the surety documents, in the form of Special Savings Certificates, would have ordinarily stand forfeited. However, as the surety has put himself to the mercy of the Court. Ms.Safa Hisbani, learned A.P.G present in Court in other matters waives notice of listed application and she after going through the file recorded no objection. Given the above, the listed application is allowed, with directions to office to return/release the surety furnished by the applicant/surety, however, subject to verification and identification in accordance with law. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
